title: daemon/store: query_spaces missing LIMIT clause
description: daemon/src/store.rs:699-710: query_spaces() has no LIMIT clause ('SELECT s.id FROM space s WHERE ... ORDER BY s.created_at ASC'). Every other similar query in this file (get_spaces, get_contacts, get_chats, etc.) has LIMIT 1000. A user who is a member of a very large number of spaces will cause this query to load all space IDs into memory. Compare to get_spaces() at line 651 which correctly has 'LIMIT 1000'. Fix: add 'LIMIT 1000' to match peer methods.
